rationale: The cited paper is used in the methods core, not only in general background. The citing paper references Zhao, Zhao, and Song (2009) when motivating state-space modeling of evolving latent parameters and again when describing Kalman-filter-based estimation of unobserved states. This indicates a concrete methodological role in how the model is set up and estimated, even though the empirical context differs.
relation_description: The citing paper applies methodological ideas associated with Zhao, Zhao, and Song (2009), using state-space treatment of latent dynamics and related estimation logic in a new B2B direct-marketing setting.
